CV

Experience

Postdoctoral Researcher

Università degli Studi di Milano-Bicocca Research group: Prof. Davide Gerosa

Milan, Italy 09/2023 – Present
  • Developing ML-based and non-parametric, hierarchical gravitational-wave data analysis pipelines.

Postdoctoral Researcher

Friedrich-Schiller-Universität Jena Research group: Prof. Sebastiano Bernuzzi

Jena, Germany 06/2021 – 08/2023
  • Contributed to and extended the functionality of the open-source Python packages xkn and gwbench.

Graduate Researcher (Ph.D.)

The Pennsylvania State University Advisor: Prof. Bangalore S. Sathyaprakash

State College, PA, USA 08/2016 – 05/2021
  • Developed and built gwbench as a modular Python framework for large-scale science case studies.
  • Investigated the science case of third-generation gravitational-wave detectors via comprehensive trade studies.
  • Investigated numerical relativity waveforms for a post-Newtonian signature in the strong-field regime.

Research Intern

Duke University RISE Worldwide Scholarship · Advisor: Prof. Kate Scholberg

Durham, NC, USA 08/2012 – 09/2012

Education

Ph.D. & M.Sc. in Physics

Technical University of Berlin
